title: Frictionless single-docker volunteer fleet entrypoint (no local binds)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

The deliverable that ties the fleet vision together: ~15-25 friends each run ONE docker command with NO local binds, all data to remote sinks. Needs: structured -> Postgres (PR #1161, sharded per instance_id), unstructured -> self-hosted Garage, work queue -> Postgres WQ. crawler.py selects all three via env vars; no -v mounts. Validate a real no-binds run. Part of #41.
